title: New Chinese Poetry Social Card AI
sourceTitle: New Chinese Poetry Social Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu-inspired poetic social graphic card for 如果汪伦也发小红书：送李白上船的那天, built as a warm New-Chinese illustrated post. Subject: The top social-post area uses 桃花潭边的汪伦, 送朋友离开，才知道什么叫舍不得, and 船要开了，话反而少了。水有千尺深，情谊比水更深。愿你一路有诗，也有人惦记。 as the readable post content, while the lower illustration shows Li Bai sitting in a boat while Wang Lun stands on the Peach Blossom Pool shore in a restrained poetic farewell scene. Scene: New-Chinese cultural illustration card with a clean social-media header, warm paper texture, poetic body text, and a lower scenic panel with water, shore, boat, robes, and gentle farewell atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 card layout: simple top account-information strip, post title below, short three-line body copy in the middle, large lower illustration panel, and clear separation between text area and scene area without becoming a phone screenshot. Signature Elements: Top social information area, 如果汪伦也发小红书：送李白上船的那天, 桃花潭边的汪伦, 送朋友离开，才知道什么叫舍不得, 船要开了，话反而少了。水有千尺深，情谊比水更深。愿你一路有诗，也有人惦记。, lower poetic scene of Li Bai sitting in a boat while Wang Lun stands on the Peach Blossom Pool shore, New-Chinese illustration, warm cultural feeling, and clear non-screenshot card layout. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Warm ivory paper, peach-blossom pink accents, muted ink green water, soft tan shore, dark readable Chinese text, and restrained red seal-like detail without real platform logo marks. Lighting: Gentle warm daylight with soft atmosphere over the water and shore, subtle paper glow in the text area, and calm cinematic illustration depth. Typography: 桃花潭边的汪伦, 送朋友离开，才知道什么叫舍不得, and 船要开了，话反而少了。水有千尺深，情谊比水更深。愿你一路有诗，也有人惦记。 appear as readable Chinese social-post text; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.title: New Chinese Poetry Social Card Ancient Poetry Social Card V1 English Regeneration 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu-inspired poetic social graphic card for 如果王维也发小红书：送朋友去远方的清晨, built as a warm New-Chinese illustrated post. Subject: The top social-post area uses 渭城雨后的王维, 有些告别，从劝你喝一杯酒开始, and 清晨的雨把尘土洗得很轻。再饮一杯吧，往西走以后，熟人就少了。愿你远行，也有人记得归期。 as the readable post content, while the lower illustration shows Wang Wei seeing off a traveling friend beside a rainy morning road outside the city in a restrained poetic farewell scene. Scene: New-Chinese cultural illustration card with a clean social-media header, warm paper texture, poetic body text, and a lower scenic panel with water, shore, boat, robes, and gentle farewell atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 card layout: simple top account-information strip, post title below, short three-line body copy in the middle, large lower illustration panel, and clear separation between text area and scene area without becoming a phone screenshot. Signature Elements: Top social information area, 如果王维也发小红书：送朋友去远方的清晨, 渭城雨后的王维, 有些告别，从劝你喝一杯酒开始, 清晨的雨把尘土洗得很轻。再饮一杯吧，往西走以后，熟人就少了。愿你远行，也有人记得归期。, lower poetic scene of Wang Wei seeing off a traveling friend beside a rainy morning road outside the city, New-Chinese illustration, warm cultural feeling, and clear non-screenshot card layout. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Warm ivory paper, peach-blossom pink accents, muted ink green water, soft tan shore, dark readable Chinese text, and restrained red seal-like detail without real platform logo marks. Lighting: Gentle warm daylight with soft atmosphere over the water and shore, subtle paper glow in the text area, and calm cinematic illustration depth. Typography: 渭城雨后的王维, 有些告别，从劝你喝一杯酒开始, and 清晨的雨把尘土洗得很轻。再饮一杯吧，往西走以后，熟人就少了。愿你远行，也有人记得归期。 appear as readable Chinese social-post text; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
